title: datura metel var. rubra
intro: Datura metel var. rubra is a variety of the Asian thorn apple plant, a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia, known for its bright red flowers and toxic seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and pain. The medicinal properties of Datura metel var. rubra have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it's essential to note that it should only be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
